title: Define Wave 30 manager provider directory/profile contract
description: Extend architecture docs with the manager-facing provider directory and provider profile contract, including list/detail payload expectations, route ownership, and UI state map for manager navigation from directory to provider profile.
acceptance_criteria: Architecture docs define manager provider directory list and provider detail contract expectations
UI state map covers loading, empty, success, forbidden, unauthorized, and retry states
Module map clarifies backend vs mobile ownership for provider directory/profile flow
